indicators.name: Large desk
indicators.rationale: A large desk provides ample space for a computer and other accessories.

indicators.name: Good lighting
indicators.rationale: The overhead lights provide sufficient illumination for computer work.

indicators.name: Couch
indicators.rationale: The presence of a couch might be distracting and not conducive to focused computer work.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for computer work with a large desk and good lighting, but the presence of a couch could be a distraction.
